ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "countrycode" TEXT /* Country code */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Country name */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the country belongs to */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Primary timezone of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the country entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country entry was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the country entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("countrycode")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "regioncode" TEXT /* Region code */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Region name */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "countrycode" TEXT /* Country code */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the region */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the region */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the region entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region entry was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the region entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regioncode"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_countrycode FOREIGN KEY ("countrycode") REFERENCES countries ("countrycode")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the user entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user entry was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the user entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user entry was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the data source entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source entry was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the data source entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the role entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role entry was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the role entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the `users` table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the `user_roles` table */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the assignment entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment entry was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the assignment entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the `data_sources` table */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the dataset entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset entry was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the dataset entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the `datasets` table */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version entry was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the version entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
